title: Sum Array
description: Write a function named 'solve' that takes an array of numbers and returns their sum.

title: Nth Fibonacci
description: Write a function named 'solve' that takes an integer N and returns the Nth Fibonacci number. (Assume solve(0) = 0, solve(1) = 1)

title: Palindrome String
description: Write a function named 'solve' that takes a string and returns true if it is a palindrome, and false otherwise.

title: Factorial
description: Write a function named 'solve' that takes a non-negative integer N and returns N! (N factorial). solve(0) = 1.

title: Reverse String
description: Write a function named 'solve' that takes a string and returns it reversed.

title: Count Vowels
description: Write a function named 'solve' that takes a string and returns the number of vowels (a, e, i, o, u) in it.

title: Max in Array
description: Write a function named 'solve' that takes an array of numbers and returns the maximum value.
